subcodes.first_line: My God, my God! Praise be unto Thee for having called me into being from the loins of one amongst Thy loved ones. I beseech Thee, O Thou by Whom the dawn breaketh
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی لک الحمد بما اظهرتنی من صلب احد من اولیائک اسئلک یا فالق الأصباح
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @martyrs and martyrdom, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @nearness and remoteness, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
